description: A customer, Michael Chen, has contacted support regarding his recent order. He ordered an 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' by mistake and wants to swap it for a 'Merino Wool Sweater'. Update Michael Chen's 'On Hold' order in the WooCommerce admin panel by replacing the 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' with one 'Merino Wool Sweater'. Recalculate the order totals and save the changes. You do not need to process any refund or payment, just update the order contents.
